hooks.statusMessage: Test gate: running project tests before commit

statusLine.command:
input=$(cat)
dir=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')
model=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name')
ctx=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty')
effort=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.effort.level // empty')
cost=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // empty')
branch=$(git -C "$dir" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)
gitdir=$(git -C "$dir" rev-parse --git-dir 2>/dev/null)
case "$gitdir" in */worktrees/*) wt=$(basename "$gitdir") ;; *) wt="" ;; esac
case "$dir" in "$HOME"/*) reldir="~${dir#$HOME}" ;; "$HOME") reldir="~" ;; *) reldir="$dir" ;; esac
printf '%s' "$model"
[ -n "$effort" ] && printf ' \033[2m|\033[0m \033[35m%s\033[0m' "$effort"
printf ' \033[2m|\033[0m \033[36m%s\033[0m' "$reldir"
[ -n "$branch" ] && printf ' \033[2m|\033[0m \033[32m%s\033[0m' "$branch"
[ -n "$wt" ] && printf ' \033[2m|\033[0m \033[34mwt %s\033[0m' "$wt"
[ -n "$ctx" ] && printf ' \033[2m|\033[0m \033[33mctx %s%%\033[0m' "$ctx"
[ -n "$cost" ] && printf ' \033[2m|\033[0m \033[90m$%.2f\033[0m' "$cost"
